description: Whole-graph column-level lineage for the project. 'edges' maps each output column to its upstream sources (the direction data flows from). 'children' is the inverted downstream map: for each upstream column, which downstream columns depend on it. 'skipped' reports how many models were not parsed (fail-soft gaps).

$schema.description: Relative path to this document's JSON Schema.

column.description: Column name on the referenced node.

node.description: dbt unique_id of the referenced node.

children.description: Downstream column lineage map (inverted from 'edges'). Keys are 'unique_id.column_name' for each upstream column; values list the downstream columns that depend on it.

column.description: Column name on the referenced node.

node.description: dbt unique_id of the referenced node.

edges.description: Upstream column lineage map. Keys are 'unique_id.column_name' for each output column; values list the upstream column references that column derives from.

skipped.description: Number of models whose column lineage could not be parsed (sqlglot fail-soft). Zero means all models were parsed successfully.

title: dbdocs api/v1/column-lineage.json
